title: chamaeplium supinum
intro: Chamaeplium supinum, also known as lesser cocklebur, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chamaeplium supinum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a variety of uses in natural remedies.
